title: Simplistic Karma
description: A way to put in use the luck attribute
body:
### Vanilla Luck attribute is... something that's not used often

But **what if**, you we're punished and rewarded for killing mobs?

this mod adds three categories

**- Good Mobs**

**- Neutral Mobs**

**- Evil Mobs**

Killing **Good** mobs subtracts 10 to your karma

Killing **Evil** mobs adds 10 to your karma

Killing **neutral** mobs does nothing to your karma

<details>
<summary>List of mobs (Spoiler) (NOT RECOMENDED)</summary>

- Allay
- Armadillo
- Axolotl
- Camel
- Cat
- Chicken
- Cod
- Cow
- Donkey
- Frog
- Glow Squid
- Horse

- Pig
- Pufferfish
- Rabbit
- Salmon
- Sheep
- Sniffer
- Squid
- Tropical Fish
- Turtle
- Villager
- Wandering Trader
- Bee

<details>
<summary>Commands (Spoiler) (For command users)</summary>

# /viewkarma
> Shows your karma value

# /setkarma
> Set your karma value from **-1024** to **1024**

</details>
